sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «In deliberateness there is safety».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ التَّفْكِيرَ قَبْلَ الْعَمَلِ يَمْنَعُ الأَخْطَاءَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da razmišljanje prije akcije sprječava greške.
sentences.translationEn: This means that thinking before acting prevents mistakes.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ مِهَادٌ إِرْسَالَ رِسَالَةٍ غَاضِبَةٍ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mihad je htio brzo poslati ljutitu poruku.
sentences.translationEn: Mihad wanted to quickly send an angry message.

sentences.arabic: انْتَظَرَ وَفَكَّرَ ثُمَّ كَتَبَ رِسَالَةً هَادِئَةً وَحَكِيمَةً.
sentences.translation: Pričekao je i razmislio, pa je napisao mirnu i mudru poruku.
sentences.translationEn: He waited and thought then wrote a calm and wise message.
